channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: What to know about sinkholes after a Pennsylvania woman may have disappeared into one
item.description: Authorities fear a grandmother in western Pennsylvania who disappeared while looking for her cat may have been swallowed by a sinkhole.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Syrian forces battling insurgents north of strategic city of Hama
item.description: BEIRUT (AP) — Syria said Wednesday its counteroffensive has pushed back insurgents attempting to advance to the strategic central city of Hama, while the insurgency says it captured more Syrian troops and Iran-backed militants in fierce battles.
item.dc:creator: KAREEM CHEHAYEB, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: A list of mispronounced words provides a retrospective of 2024, from Kamala to Chappell
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Vice President Kamala Harris and breakout pop star Chappell Roan were among the year's most talked-about people. Their names were also among the most mispronounced.
item.dc:creator: JAMIE STENGLE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Transgender rights case lands at Supreme Court amid debate over ban on medical treatments for minors
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court is hearing arguments Wednesday in just its second major transgender rights case, which is a challenge to a Tennessee law that bans gender-affirming care for minors.
item.dc:creator: MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: College students killed in fiery Cybertruck accident day before Thanksgiving
item.description: Three recent graduates of Piedmont High School tragically lost their lives in a fiery crash the day before Thanksgiving and the city of Piedmont released their names Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Philippines says China's coast guard fired water cannons and sideswiped its patrol vessel
item.description: MANILA, Philippines (AP) — Chinese coast guard vessels backed by navy ships fired powerful water cannons and blocked and sideswiped a Philippine patrol vessel on Wednesday in renewed aggression at a disputed shoal in the South China Sea, Philippine officials said.
item.dc:creator: JIM GOMEZ, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Oregon prosecutor slams 'leniency' of state law protecting man convicted of 13-year-old girl's rape, murder
item.description: A prosecutor is criticizing an Oregon law that would significantly reduce prison time for a man, 18, was sentenced to life for the rape and murder of a 13-year-old girl.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hamas and Fatah are near an agreement on who will oversee postwar Gaza
item.description: CAIRO (AP) — Palestinian officials say Fatah and Hamas are closing in on an agreement to appoint a committee of politically independent technocrats to administer the Gaza Strip after the war. It would effectively end Hamas' rule and could help advance ceasefire talks with Israel.
item.dc:creator: SAMY MAGDY and JOSEF FEDERMAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: An Israeli strike kills a person in Lebanon, further shaking the tenuous ceasefire
item.description: NABATIYEH, Lebanon (AP) — Israeli forces carried out several new drone and artillery strikes in Lebanon on Tuesday, including a deadly strike that the Health Ministry and state media said killed one person, further shaking a tenuous ceasefire meant to end more than a year of fighting with Hezbollah.
item.dc:creator: BASSAM HATOUM and SALLY ABOU ALJOUD, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: New UN aid chief vows 'ruthlessness' to prioritize spending as funding for world's crises shrinks
item.description: GENEVA (AP) — The new head of the U.N. humanitarian aid agency says it will be “ruthless” when prioritizing how to spend money, a nod to challenges in fundraising for civilians in war zones like Gaza, Sudan, Syria and Ukraine. Tom Fletcher, a longtime British diplomat who took up the U.N.
item.dc:creator: JAMEY KEATEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Shock martial law edict in South Korea follows chaotic recent history: A look at the crucial context
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — It may seem that the wild predawn scenes in Seoul, with hundreds of armed troops and frantic lawmakers storming South Korea's parliament building after the president suddenly declared martial law, came out of nowhere.
item.dc:creator: FOSTER KLUG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Democrat Adam Gray captures California's 13th US House District, ousting Republican Rep. John Duarte
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Democrat Adam Gray captured California’s 13th Congressional District on Tuesday, unseating Republican Rep. John Duarte in the final U.S. House contest to be decided this year.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. BLOOD, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: An ex-officer who died in an apparent suicide before his abuse trial was not supposed to have a gun
item.description: TOPEKA, Kan. (AP) — A former police detective in Kansas who died in an apparent suicide as he was about to stand trial for allegedly sexually assaulting and terrorizing vulnerable women for decades wasn't supposed to have a gun while he was under house arrest.
item.dc:creator: JOHN HANNA and HEATHER HOLLINGSWORTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge to consider first lawsuit to overturn Missouri's near-total abortion ban
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Abortion-rights advocates are asking a judge Wednesday to overturn Missouri’s near-total ban on the procedure, less than a month after voters backed an abortion-rights constitutional amendment.
item.dc:creator: SUMMER BALLENTINE and HEATHER HOLLINGSWORTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-ballerina convicted of killing husband in 'Black Swan' case gets 20 years in prison
item.description: Ashley Benefield, who was found guilty of manslaughter for shooting her husband during a domestic argument in 2020 sentencing hearing is set for today.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, KRON4

item.title: Savage killer captured in Mexico after TikTok video helps reveal his location: police
item.description: A Florida man was arrested in Mexico nearly 3 1/2 years after he allegedly shot and killed his ex-girlfriend, who he lured to a cemetery with their infant child.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: E. coli outbreak linked to McDonald's onions is over: CDC
item.description: An outbreak across 14 states in October connected to McDonald’s slivered onions from the popular menu item impacted at least 100 people.
item.dc:creator: Joanne Haner, KREX 5

item.title: Murder trial of tech consultant in stabbing death of Cash App founder Bob Lee to go to jurors
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Closing arguments in the high-profile murder trial of a tech consultant charged in the stabbing death of Cash App founder Bob Lee concluded Tuesday, with both sides urging jurors to use their common sense to deliver justice.
item.dc:creator: JANIE HAR, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Lawsuit against NY Education Department to move forward after parents say children were discriminated against
item.description: A judge ruled that a federal discrimination suit against the New York State Education Department can move forward after parents said that their children were discriminated against.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Missouri executes a man for sexually assaulting and strangling a 9-year-old girl in 2007
item.description: BONNE TERRE, Mo. (AP) — Rowan Ford knew Christopher Collings as “Uncle Chris” after he spent several months living with her family. On Tuesday, Collings was executed for sexually assaulting and killing the child, then dumping her body in a sinkhole outside a small Missouri town.
item.dc:creator: JIM SALTER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Death of Kansas sailor in training exercise now a homicide
item.description: Master-at-Arms 1st Class Simone Campbell, who served with Lyndon, said he always encouraged his fellow sailors to succeed.
item.dc:creator: Wil Day, NewsNation

item.title: Trial begins in the killing of an Ole Miss student who was known in the local LGBTQ+ community
item.description: A University of Mississippi student who disappeared in 2022 was a happy person who spoke with his mother daily and called her every year to sing happy birthday, his mom testified Tuesday in the trial of the man charged with killing her son.
item.dc:creator: EMILY WAGSTER PETTUS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jury deliberations begin in veteran Daniel Penny's trial over using chokehold on Jordan Neely
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Jurors began deliberating and soon revisited some of their legal instructions Tuesday in the trial of a military veteran charged with using a fatal chokehold to subdue a New York subway rider whose behavior was alarming other passengers.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sinkhole may have swallowed Pennsylvania grandmother looking for missing cat: police
item.description: Authorities fear a Pennsylvania grandmother searching for her missing cat may have been swallowed by a sinkhole.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, NewsNation

item.title: Chad Chronister, Donald Trump’s pick to run the DEA, withdraws name from consideration
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Chad Chronister, Donald Trump's pick to run the Drug Enforcement Administration, said Tuesday he was withdrawing his name from consideration, becoming the second person selected by the president-elect to bow out quickly after being nominated for a position requiring Senate confirmati
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump’s DEA nominee withdraws from consideration just days after being picked
item.description: President-elect Trump’s choice to lead the Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA) announced on Tuesday he is withdrawing from consideration just three days after Trump made his nomination known.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: Missing Illinois man's remains found in Arizona desert: Officials
item.description: Chris Sins, 34, grew up in Millstadt, Illinois. He lived in Belleville before moving to Arizona to help care for his ailing father.
item.dc:creator: Andy Banker, NewsNation

item.title: Prosecutors: DC police officer’s talk with Proud Boys leader grew secretive as arrest neared
item.description: Metropolitan Police Department Lt. Shane Lamond’s communication with the former leader of the Proud Boys increased and grew more secretive as pressure to arrest him mounted in 2020, prosecutors said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, WGN 9

item.title: Justice Department announces sweeping reforms to curb suicides in federal prisons and jails
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Justice Department is ramping up efforts to address a crisis of suicides and systemic failures in federal prisons and jails, announcing sweeping reforms aimed at overhauling how mental health care is provided behind bars.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL BALSAMO and MICHAEL R. SISAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Great Lakes region braces for more snow while cleaning up after lake-effect storms
item.description: Even more snow could be on the way for places in the Great Lakes region that are still digging out after days of storms caused deadly wrecks, collapsed a barn on top of 100 cows and buried some towns under nearly 6 feet (1.8 meters).
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SHIPKOWSKI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: FBI offers $15K reward in case of Maine teen missing since September
item.description: The teenager reportedly had an argument with her sister before walking out of her house into the woods.
item.dc:creator: Steph Whiteside, Fox 5

item.title: Former SmileDirectClub customers may be eligible for a refund
item.description: When SmileDirectClub shut down a year ago, scores of existing customers of the teeth-straightening company were left in limbo. Now, tens of thousands are set to get some relief.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Vikings win 5th straight, rallying past Cardinals 23-22 on Sam Darnold's TD pass with 1:13 left
item.description: Sam Darnold's second touchdown pass of the second half went to Jones for Minnesota's first lead with 1:13 remaining, and the Vikings rallied from 13 points down to beat the Arizona Cardinals 23-22 on Sunday for their fifth straight victory.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: New concrete formula could be key to fixing the roads: Michigan researchers
item.description: A team of researchers at Michigan State University claim this new type of concrete is “flexible, self-heating and self-healing.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, WGN 9

item.title: Heavy snow and numbing temperatures keep parts of the US in a deep freeze
item.description: Heavy snowfall and numbing temperatures kept parts of the U.S. in a deep freeze Sunday as the Thanksgiving holiday weekend draws to a close.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Trump selects Hillsborough Sheriff Chad Chronister as DEA Administrator
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump announced Saturday afternoon he plans to nominate Hillsborough County Sheriff Chad Chronister to be the next Administrator of the Drug Enforcement Agency (DEA).
item.dc:creator: Sierra Rains, WFLA, NBC

item.title: DNA test brings NY father, daughter together after nearly 50 years
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Thanksgiving is more than a tradition – it's a time for loved ones and families to get together, to embrace and give thanks for all that is good in their lives. For one family in Rockland County, this is a special holiday. A daughter and her biological father are together.
item.dc:creator: Marvin Scott, WGN 9
